seoTitle: Create Links to Tabs in Power BI With Navigation Buttons
metaDescription: Learn how to add page navigation buttons in Power BI so viewers can move between report tabs easily, creating a more interactive experience.
intro: Navigating a multi-page Power BI report shouldn't require viewers to hunt for the right tab. This guide covers how to add page navigation buttons that link directly to specific tabs, making your reports easier to explore and more professional.

steps.heading: Get an overview of page navigation buttons
steps.body: Understand how navigation buttons work in Power BI, letting you link a clickable button directly to another page within the same report.

steps.heading: Follow the step-by-step guide to create links
steps.body: Insert a button onto your report page and configure its action to navigate to the specific tab you want viewers to reach.

steps.heading: Test and troubleshoot links
steps.body: Click through your navigation buttons after setup to confirm they lead to the correct pages, adjusting the configuration if anything is off.

steps.heading: Follow best practices for user-friendly reports
steps.body: Use clear labeling and consistent button placement so navigation feels intuitive across every page of your report.

steps.heading: Explore use cases for business and automation
steps.body: Navigation buttons are especially useful in reports with multiple sections, such as summary, detail, and trend pages, helping stakeholders explore data at their own pace.

faq.question: Can I use an image as a navigation button in Power BI?
faq.answer: Yes, Power BI allows you to use both standard shapes and custom images as clickable navigation buttons.

faq.question: Do navigation buttons work when the report is shared or published?
faq.answer: Yes, navigation buttons function the same way for viewers accessing a shared or published report as they do in edit mode.

faq.question: Why isn't my navigation button linking to the correct page?
faq.answer: This is usually caused by an incorrect action configuration on the button, so double-check that the destination page is properly selected.

faq.question: Can I add multiple navigation buttons on a single page?
faq.answer: Yes, you can add as many navigation buttons as needed to help viewers move between different sections of your report.
